ocr_findings.description: In the コミュニケーションで大切なこと section: image reads '（2）情報を知らせる人に送っていない' but cleaned OCR contains '（2）情報を知らせる人에送っていなかった'. The character '에' is a Korean Hangul syllable that has been erroneously substituted for Japanese particle 'に'. This is a foreign character intrusion that garbles the sentence and would break downstream processing.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 07-05 content page on プロジェクトコミュニケーションマネジメント. Overall text capture is good, but one high-severity error: a Korean Hangul character '에' was inserted in place of Japanese particle 'に', which materially corrupts the sentence. This page requires re-OCR or manual correction of that specific line.
